title: pgstat — Vacuum & Bloat
description: Tablolardaki dead tuple oranlari, autovacuum/autoanalyze gecmisi, vacuum/analyze devam edenler.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

targets.rawSql: select coalesce(sum(n_dead_tup_estimate), 0) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance)

select coalesce(sum(n_live_tup_estimate), 0) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance)

select round(100.0 * sum(n_dead_tup_estimate)::numeric / nullif(sum(n_dead_tup_estimate + n_live_tup_estimate), 0), 1) as value from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance)
select count(*) as value from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '5 minutes' and command in ('VACUUM','ANALYZE')

panels.title: Top 30 Tablo — Dead Tuple Oranı
panels.description: Dead tuple oranı yüksek tablolar — VACUUM adayları.

targets.rawSql: with current as (select schemaname, relname, n_live_tup_estimate, n_dead_tup_estimate from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance)), range_acc as (select schemaname, relname, sum(autovacuum_count_delta) as autovacs, sum(autoanalyze_count_delta) as autoanalyzes from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts) group by schemaname, relname) select c.schemaname || '.' || c.relname as relation, c.n_live_tup_estimate as live_tup, c.n_dead_tup_estimate as dead_tup, round(100.0 * c.n_dead_tup_estimate::numeric / nullif(c.n_live_tup_estimate + c.n_dead_tup_estimate, 0), 1) as dead_pct, coalesce(r.autovacs, 0) as autovacs_in_range, coalesce(r.autoanalyzes, 0) as autoanalyzes_in_range from current c left join range_acc r on r.schemaname = c.schemaname and r.relname = c.relname where (c.n_live_tup_estimate + c.n_dead_tup_estimate) > 1000 order by dead_pct desc nulls last limit 30

panels.title: Hiç Autovacuum Görmemiş Tablolar
panels.description: Tablo > 1000 tup ama autovacuum_count = 0 — config sorunu olabilir.

targets.rawSql: with current as (select schemaname, relname, n_live_tup_estimate, n_dead_tup_estimate from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance) and (n_live_tup_estimate + n_dead_tup_estimate) > 1000), recent_vac as (select schemaname, relname from fact.pg_table_stat_delta where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts > now() - interval '7 days' group by schemaname, relname having sum(coalesce(autovacuum_count_delta, 0) + coalesce(vacuum_count_delta, 0)) > 0) select c.schemaname || '.' || c.relname as relation, c.n_live_tup_estimate as live_tup, c.n_dead_tup_estimate as dead_tup from current c left join recent_vac rv on rv.schemaname = c.schemaname and rv.relname = c.relname where rv.relname is null order by c.n_live_tup_estimate desc nulls last limit 30

select sample_ts, command, datname, relname, phase, blocks_total, blocks_done, progress_pct from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance and sample_ts = (select max(sample_ts) from fact.pg_progress_snapshot where instance_pk = $instance) order by command, relname
